author: rhorheeymarh
content: Hi <@686695036733227017> I noticed in the recording that whenever you're the one talking, I cant hear anything or I strain to hear. But when Etan talks it's very clear (I even have to reduce the volume when he's talking coz I put it in highest when youre talking so I can hear what you're saying). I don't know if any other person experienced this but I'm just saying it so it can probably be rectified for upcoming videos if it was an issue from your end
